src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
Reformat the empty annotation interface body to use a single line instead of braces on separate lines.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x package structure and security defaults.
Update Liquibase properties import path to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Rename the static logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Add a workaround to disable Spring Boot DevTools restart via system property to prevent conflicts with Hazelcast.
Replace explicit type declarations with the 'var' keyword for local variables where the type is obvious.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve code readability and reuse.
Refactor multi-line string literals to use Java 15+ text blocks for better formatting and readability.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut definitions for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logging statements for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Reformatted logger.error() calls to align arguments vertically.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevent potential NullPointerException when logging exception cause in production profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed e.getCause() to String.valueOf(e.getCause()) in the else branch of logAfterThrowing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use local variable type inference for cleaner code style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced explicit Logger type with var for the log variable declaration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties like async start behavior.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field and public static class Liquibase with asyncStart property.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
Rename the constant array from SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better semantic clarity.
Update ServerProperties import to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
Remove unused imports related to removed build properties and key generation.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring context annotations.
Convert instance logger field to static final constant following best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl:
-private final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CacheConfiguration.class);
+private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CacheConfiguration.class);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update all log statements to use the new static LOG constant.
Remove fields and setters for Git and Build properties that are no longer used.
Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean that depended on the removed build properties.
Enable configuration properties for H2 Console to support modern Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to ensure it only starts when H2 console is enabled.
Refactor logger instance to follow modern Java conventions (static final field).
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable to utilize Java 10+ feature.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace instance logger field with static final logger constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to allow runtime configuration of Liquibase startup behavior.
Implement conditional logic to choose between async and sync Liquibase initialization based on configuration.
Convert contexts list to comma-delimited string manually to handle API changes in LiquibaseProperties.
Convert label filter list to comma-delimited string manually to handle API changes in LiquibaseProperties.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for checking active Spring profiles.
